markdown:
#  Enable the Payments Issued Tab on a Commitment 
##  Background 
You can enable the Payments Issued tab on a purchase order or a subcontract. As shown in the demo below, the controls in this tab give your project users the ability to add new payment line items for a purchase order or a commitment. It also provides a convenient list that summarizes all of the payments issued.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * Add the Invoicing tool to the project. See [Add and Remove Project Tools](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. Under the **Contracts** tab, locate the purchase order or subcontract. Then click **Edit**.
  3. Click the **Advanced Settings** tab.  
_Note:_ Advanced Settings may be listed under the **More** tab.
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Under **Payment** , place a mark in the **Enable Payments** checkbox.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Add a New Payment to the Payments Issued Tab of a Commitment (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/add-a-new-payment-to-the-payments-issued-tab-on-a-commitment)
  * [Commitments - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/permissions)
  * [Edit the Advanced Settings Tab on a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-the-advanced-settings-on-a-commitment)
title: Enable the Payments Issued Tab on a Commitment
description: How to enable the Payment Issues tab in a commitment.
